items.title: Mnogi na autocestama voze lijevom trakom. "Desna je užasna, čuvam auto i sebe"
items.summary: VOZAČI na autocesti A3 sve češće voze lijevom trakom zbog uništene desne, riskirajući kaznu. HAC je svjestan problema i najavljuje opsežnu sanaciju kolnika na više dionica u iduće tri godine.

items.title: Sports Emmys: ESPN, Fox Sports, Dodgers’ World Series Victory Among This Year’s Top Winners
items.summary: Go Dodgers! Fox’s coverage of the 2025 World Series between the Toronto Blue Jays and Los Angeles Dodgers won the Emmy for outstanding live sports special: championship event at this year’s Sports Emmys.
